abilities.name: Wayfinding
abilities.narrationHints: Reading ground, growth, and weather-sign like text. Broken stems, pressed moss, the age of a print.
abilities.description: Read trails, weather-sign, and country to track, navigate, and estimate what passed and when.
abilities.notFor: Tracking through running water or across bare rock without a check; reading intent (only movement); urban crowds.

tree.name: Trail Sense
tree.grants: Follow a clear trail up to a day old; judge party size and burden; find water and shelter in known country.
tree.cannot: Trails older than a day; deliberate anti-tracking beats you without a check.

tree.name: Cold Trail
tree.grants: Follow trails days old; read a campsite's story (numbers, mood, hurry); shortcut known routes — travel time -1h on familiar ground.
tree.cannot: No effect in true wilderness whiteout; can't track flyers or swimmers.

tree.name: Country Speaks
tree.grants: One look at open country reveals routes, hazards, and anything recently unusual; anticipate where quarry is HEADED, not just where it went.
tree.cannot: Prediction fails against quarry that knows you're tracking; not mind-reading — a feint can still fool you.

abilities.name: Greenlore
abilities.narrationHints: Hedge-medicine with dirt under its nails. Poultices, bitter teas, knowing which mushroom forgives and which doesn't.
abilities.description: Field medicine and plant knowledge: remedies, poultices, antidotes, and what's safe to eat.
abilities.notFor: Surgery or broken bones beyond splinting; instant effects (remedies take time); anything without materials to hand.

tree.name: Hedge Remedy
tree.grants: Forage safe food and common medicinals; brew a poultice or tea that restores small health over a rest; identify common poisons.
tree.cannot: Can't treat serious wounds or strong toxins; needs local plants and an hour.

tree.name: Deep Pharmacopeia
tree.grants: Counter most natural poisons and sickness; remedies now also restore energy; read a person's ailment from face, breath, and gait.
tree.cannot: Precursor-touched afflictions resist; can't stockpile — preparations spoil in days.

tree.name: The Old Recipes
tree.grants: Brews that verge on legend: a night's sleep in an hour, clarity through exhaustion, one dose that stabilizes the dying. Recognize Precursor-altered growth. And the hand that knows all of this knows it BOTH WAYS — a draught that dulls, slows, sickens, or drops a person where they stand, prepared as carefully as any remedy.
tree.cannot: It has to be taken, which means it has to be given — this is patient, deliberate work and never a thing done in a fight. Valley folk hang people for it. And every herbalist good enough to do it is the first person suspected when someone falls ill, which is why most of them never learn this rank at all.

abilities.name: Mediator's Tongue
abilities.narrationHints: The voice that lowers a room's temperature. Naming each side's real stake out loud until the knives feel silly.
abilities.description: De-escalate, arbitrate, and find the shape of a deal both sides can live with.
abilities.notFor: Deception (this craft is spent honestly or it stops working); commanding crowds; anyone with nothing left to lose.

tree.name: Cool the Room
tree.grants: Halt a brewing fight long enough for words; read what each party actually wants beneath what they're saying.
tree.cannot: Doesn't work mid-violence; can't make anyone accept — only opens the door.

tree.name: Fair Measure
tree.grants: Broker deals that hold — agreements you mediate gain weight in the community ledger; call out a lie in negotiation and be believed.
tree.cannot: Can't broker what one side truly can't give; your reputation is collateral on every deal.

tree.name: The Binding Word
tree.grants: Arbitrate feuds of long standing; your settlements carry near-law in communities that know you; once per season, one hostile audience becomes neutral.
tree.cannot: Fails against zealotry; a settlement you break yourself burns this ability's trust to rank 1 until amends.

abilities.name: Tinker's Hand
abilities.narrationHints: Wire, wax, patience, and disrespect for the word 'broken.' Fixes that shouldn't hold but do.
abilities.description: Repair, improvise, and jury-rig — coaxing function from broken things with whatever's on hand.
abilities.notFor: Fine artisanship (it works, it isn't pretty); Precursor internals without study; making something from truly nothing.

tree.name: Field Fix
tree.grants: Repair common tools, gear, and mechanisms with scrounged parts; improvise a simple tool on the spot; judge what broke something.
tree.cannot: Fixes are temporary under hard use; no locks, no Precursor work.

tree.name: Coaxing Function
tree.grants: Open common locks and mechanisms; repairs now hold permanently; build compound devices (pulley rigs, traps, stills) from salvage.
tree.cannot: Precursor mechanisms still resist; complex builds take a day and materials.

tree.name: Speaker to Machines
tree.grants: Diagnose ANY mechanism by touch and sound, Precursor included; once per day, coax one dead device to run one more time; your builds count as quality goods.
tree.cannot: Coaxed devices die again after; understanding Precursor function is not understanding purpose.

abilities.name: Beastfriend
abilities.narrationHints: Stillness animals trust. Reading ears and hackles like weather; being read back and found harmless.
abilities.description: Calm, read, and work with animals — from skittish livestock to wary wild things.
abilities.notFor: Commanding animals against their nature; Precursor-altered creatures without a check; anything mid-frenzy.

tree.name: Gentle Presence
tree.grants: Calm domestic animals; read a beast's mood and recent past; wild animals don't flee your approach.
tree.cannot: No commands — only trust; predators stay dangerous.

tree.name: Working Trust
tree.grants: Ask simple tasks of animals that know you (carry, guard, find); a companion beast may take you on; sense what nearby animals sense.
tree.cannot: Companion is a partner, not a tool — mistreat it and it's gone; borrowed senses are impressions, not sight.

tree.name: The Old Accord
tree.grants: Parley meaningfully with any natural creature; Precursor-touched beasts recognize you as neutral. And in wild country you may call for aid and something answers — it places itself between you and what threatens you, and it will strike to wound: a large animal in earnest breaks bone and tears, and none of that is yours to moderate once it has begun.
tree.cannot: You ASK — always. Nothing here is compelled, and a creature that answers is risking its own life for you, may be hurt or killed doing it, and remembers. Ask too often, or for the wrong thing, and the wild country stops answering.

abilities.name: Stonewise
abilities.narrationHints: Reading load paths and old repairs in a wall like a mason's diary. Knowing which ledge holds and which lies.
abilities.description: Read stone, structure, and ground: what holds, what's about to fail, what was built and why.
abilities.notFor: X-ray sight (reads surfaces and stresses, not hidden rooms directly); metallurgy; speed — a proper read takes minutes.

tree.name: Sound Footing
tree.grants: Judge whether floor, bridge, ledge, or wall will hold; find the safe climbing line; spot recent structural disturbance.
tree.cannot: Deliberately disguised work needs a check; no read through cladding.

tree.name: Mason's Eye
tree.grants: Date construction and read its story (repairs, sieges, haste); detect voids by resonance tap; find the weak point that brings a structure down — or the brace that saves it. Named to a crew with hammers, that point breaks a wall in one session, and whatever is standing under it comes down with it.
tree.cannot: Void detection gives presence, not layout; Precursor materials read as 'wrong' without detail.

tree.name: Bones of the World
tree.grants: Read geology like architecture: predict collapse, slide, or sinkhole; navigate caves by stone-sense; Precursor construction yields its structural logic (not its purpose).
tree.cannot: Prediction is hours-scale, not weeks; living rock keeps some secrets — margin of error the GM holds.

abilities.name: Rivercraft
abilities.narrationHints: The river as a moody neighbor you've known for years. Reading current-braid and sky together.
abilities.description: Boats, currents, crossings, and weather-sense — the water-roads of the valley and what moves on them.
abilities.notFor: Open sea; fighting the water (it's about not fighting); breathing underwater.

tree.name: River Legs
tree.grants: Handle small craft in rough water; find the safe ford; read tomorrow's weather from sky and water; swim strongly burdened.
tree.cannot: Rapids beyond class of your craft still say no; weather-sense is a day out, not a week.

tree.name: Current's Confidant
tree.grants: Run water others portage; read what the river carries and where from (debris, silt, bodies of news); night navigation by sound of water alone.
tree.cannot: The gray water reads as silence — a gap, not a message; can't read still water's depths.

tree.name: Watershed Mind
tree.grants: Hold the whole watershed in your head: predict flood and drought weeks out, trace ANY sample to its source reach, know where something dumped upstream comes ashore.
tree.cannot: Tracing needs a sample in hand; the watershed's Precursor plumbing appears in the model only as anomalies.

abilities.name: Quiet Step
abilities.narrationHints: Moving like a held breath. Not invisibility — just never being where the eye lands.
abilities.description: Move unseen and unheard; scout, shadow, and slip away.
abilities.notFor: Open ground in daylight against alert watchers; staying hidden while acting loudly; groups — this craft is solitary.

tree.name: Soft Ground
tree.grants: Move silently over natural terrain; use shadow and cover to pass casual watch; shadow a person through a town unnoticed.
tree.cannot: Alert sentries and open ground beat you without a check; armor noise is armor noise.

tree.name: Unremarked
tree.grants: Pass alert watchers with cover; read a guard pattern in minutes and thread it; leave a pursuit behind in any broken country.
tree.cannot: Animals still smell you; can't vanish from someone already watching you.

tree.name: The Unseen Errand
tree.grants: Enter and leave watched places as if the watch blinked; move a small party quietly using your reads; once per day, break line-of-sight and be simply gone.
tree.cannot: 'Gone' means escaped, not teleported — the GM places you plausibly; Precursor sensors don't blink.

abilities.name: Storykeeper
abilities.narrationHints: The one who holds the valley's memory out loud. A story for every stone, and the discipline to keep them straight.
abilities.description: Hold, recall, and deploy the valley's stories — living memory as a working tool.
abilities.notFor: Reading (this is oral craft); knowing what nobody ever told anyone; lying — a storykeeper's coin is accuracy.

tree.name: Long Memory
tree.grants: Recall any story you've heard verbatim; know the common lore of any valley place or family; earn welcome in a strange hall by performing.
tree.cannot: Recall is of what you've HEARD — gaps are gaps; welcome isn't trust.

tree.name: The Threads Between
tree.grants: Cross-reference stories to surface what they jointly imply (codex synergy: +insight when a known topic is in play); notice when a live account contradicts the record; a told story can steady a shaken group.
tree.cannot: Implication isn't proof; steadying works once per group per trouble.

tree.name: Keeper of the Deep Stock
tree.grants: Access the old stratum — pre-crisis stories most keepers lost; recognize when events are RHYMING with an old story and read the pattern forward; your tellings enter the community record with weight.
tree.cannot: The old stratum is fragmentary and the GM holds its gaps; pattern-rhyme is probabilistic, never prophecy.

abilities.name: Hearthbinding
abilities.narrationHints: Making anywhere briefly home. The fire built right, the food that tastes like safety, watches that let people actually sleep.
abilities.description: Turn a stop into a hearth: camps, meals, and watch-order that restore a group beyond what rest alone gives.
abilities.notFor: Solo benefit (this craft is for groups); combat; hurry — a hearth takes an evening.

tree.name: Good Camp
tree.grants: Camps you make restore +2 extra health and energy to everyone overnight; cook a real meal from thin supplies; a night's watch order that actually works.
tree.cannot: Needs an evening and minimal materials; no benefit in a hostile active scene.

tree.name: Table Peace
tree.grants: Meals you host suspend quarrels at the fire — hostile parties will eat together; overnight recovery also clears one minor condition; travelers remember your camps and owe small warmth.
tree.cannot: Peace lasts as long as the meal plus the night; deep feuds are suspended, not settled.

tree.name: The Standing Hearth
tree.grants: A camp you keep three nights becomes a named place (enters place memory); companions and party bond faster at your fire (bond-relevant deeds count +1 weight); once per journey, a full night at your hearth restores as a rest at home.
tree.cannot: Named places persist but so does their reputation — what happens there is remembered; the once-per-journey rest can't raise the incapacitated.

abilities.name: Keen Appraisal
abilities.narrationHints: The glance that inventories a room. Worth, wear, provenance, and the one thing that doesn't belong.
abilities.description: See what's actually there: value, provenance, condition, and the detail everyone else missed.
abilities.notFor: Speed-reading people's intent (objects and scenes, not minds); magic-sense; appraising the truly unique without comparables.

tree.name: True Worth
tree.grants: Price goods accurately at a glance; spot forgery, shoddy work, and hidden damage; notice the one detail out of place in a scene.
tree.cannot: Exotic and Precursor items read as 'beyond scale'; the detail is noticed, not explained.

tree.name: Provenance
tree.grants: Read an object's history from wear (who used it, how, how long); estimate any collection's worth in minutes; spot a concealed item on a person by how they carry.
tree.cannot: History is inference — deliberate aging can fool a first read; carrying-reads need line of sight.

tree.name: Nothing Hidden
tree.grants: One sweep of a room yields its full inventory including the concealed (GM names what's findable); appraise the priceless by structural logic; your valuation is accepted as expert in any market.
tree.cannot: The sweep is once per location per visit; some Precursor concealment is beyond craft.

abilities.name: Old Roads
abilities.narrationHints: A feel for where the old world's bones run. Straight lines under crooked fields; doors that were never doors.
abilities.description: Sense, follow, and safely approach Precursor traces — the old roads under the valley's skin.
abilities.notFor: Understanding Precursor PURPOSE (only presence and pattern); activating anything; safety guarantees — this craft finds the door, not what's behind it.

tree.name: The Straight Feeling
tree.grants: Sense Precursor material and workings nearby (direction and rough distance); recognize safe salvage from live remnant; follow a buried alignment across country.
tree.cannot: Sense, not sight — no detail; depth beyond a few meters muddies the read.

tree.name: Reading the Bones
tree.grants: Map a site's Precursor layout by walking it; judge whether a remnant is dormant, cycling, or waking; salvage from the edge of live systems without triggering them.
tree.cannot: Judgment is craft, not certainty — 'waking' can lie; nothing here opens what's sealed.

tree.name: Where They Walked
tree.grants: The deep net reveals itself: perceive the valley's whole Precursor lattice from any node; sense when the lattice CHANGES state anywhere on it; approach places that repel others.
tree.cannot: The lattice's purpose stays dark — pattern without meaning; state-changes arrive as feeling, not fact; some doors notice being noticed.

abilities.name: Blend In
abilities.narrationHints: You become the least memorable person in the room.
abilities.description: Pass unnoticed in a crowd or settlement — look like you belong, be forgotten.
abilities.notFor: Hiding from someone actively hunting you by name; physical invisibility.

tree.name: Blend In
tree.grants: Move through populated places without drawing notice or memory.
tree.cannot: A searcher who knows your face and is looking defeats it.

tree.name: One of Them
tree.grants: Not merely unnoticed — READ as belonging. The guard nods you through; the crowd makes room.
tree.cannot: Belonging is a performance you must keep performing. One wrong word and you were always a stranger.

tree.name: Nobody At All
tree.grants: You are the person nobody afterward can quite describe — present, unremarkable, entirely forgettable.
tree.cannot: Being forgettable means being forgotten. Valleyfolk who lean on this find it hard to be known when they want to be.

abilities.name: Boundary-Stone
abilities.narrationHints: A marked stone set, and what it forbids stays out.
abilities.description: Set a simple lasting ward at a threshold — keeps small beasts, weather, or casual trespass out of a camp or home.
abilities.notFor: Stopping a determined intruder; grand wards.

tree.name: Boundary-Stone
tree.grants: Ward a camp or dwelling against animals, weather, and casual intrusion.
tree.cannot: A determined person walks through it; it deters, not stops.

tree.name: The Kept Boundary
tree.grants: Set a boundary that holds — a threshold, a claim, a line that things notice and respect.
tree.cannot: A boundary is a claim, and claims are contested. It holds against what respects it.

tree.name: The Old Boundary
tree.grants: Set a boundary that has the weight of the old ones — it feels ANCIENT, and even things that do not respect you respect that.
tree.cannot: The old boundaries were set by people who paid for them. Yours borrows that credit; the Valley remembers who actually paid.

abilities.name: Hunter's Strike
abilities.narrationHints: The practiced killing blow of someone who feeds a family by it.
abilities.description: A trained practical strike — spear, sling, axe, bow — honest damage from a working hunter.
abilities.notFor: Formal martial technique (the Edge); many foes.

tree.name: Hunter's Strike
tree.grants: Strike effectively with common weapons; land a killing blow on beast or foe.
tree.cannot: No warrior's forms; one target, honest force.

tree.name: The Clean Kill
tree.grants: Strike where a thing actually ends — quickly, without waste, without suffering you did not need.
tree.cannot: Clean is a discipline, not a mercy. The animal is still dead, and you still did it.

tree.name: The Strike That Feeds
tree.grants: Nothing is wasted — the strike, the taking, the use. The old Valley ethic made into a single motion.
tree.cannot: It is a hunter's craft, not a soldier's. Turned on people it is exactly as ugly as it sounds.
